name_en: BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, a mainstay on the official website, an absolutely explosive style this year🔥. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front engraved logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket, a style favored by many stars and influencers, dimensions 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging
